category.name: Paragraphs
category.preferred_workflow: Prefer simple DocumentBuilder workflows for paragraph insertion and formatting tasks. Use direct Paragraph DOM traversal for counting, filtering, reporting, text import/export, and structural edits.

minimal_primary_rules: Bootstrap all DOC, DOCX, and TXT inputs locally.
Do not invent unsupported paragraph or layout APIs.
Prefer DocumentBuilder for simple insertion and formatting tasks.
paragraph_formatting_rules: Use Paragraph.ParagraphFormat for alignment, spacing, indent, bidi, shading, outline level, page break, and style changes.
Validate the exact target paragraph instead of broad paragraph counts.
editing_rules: Do not call Run.Replace; update Run.Text while preserving formatting.
For merge and split tasks, edit real Paragraph nodes and keep the surrounding document structure valid.
For replacement tasks, preserve existing run formatting unless the task explicitly changes it.
api_safety_bans: Do not use fake namespaces such as Aspose.Words.Paragraphs.
Do not invent layout APIs for paragraph line counts.

common_failure_patterns.symptom: Compiler error that Aspose.Words.Paragraphs does not exist.
Compiler errors around Paragraph.GetLinesCount and invented layout helpers.
common_failure_patterns.fix: Use a compile-safe approximation for line-count tasks rather than unsupported APIs.

common_failure_patterns.symptom: Compiler error that Run does not expose Replace.
common_failure_patterns.fix: Edit Run.Text while preserving run formatting.

common_failure_patterns.symptom: Runtime failures caused by asserting total paragraph counts for tasks that only required a targeted insertion or formatting change.
common_failure_patterns.fix: Validate the exact target paragraph or target scope only.

examples.task: Insert a new paragraph with custom text using DocumentBuilder.Writeln inside a document loop.
Insert an empty paragraph at a specific node using DocumentBuilder.InsertParagraph for precise placement.
Set paragraph alignment to center by modifying builder.CurrentParagraph.ParagraphFormat.Alignment property for the current paragraph.
Adjust paragraph line spacing to 1.5 lines by setting builder.CurrentParagraph.ParagraphFormat.LineSpacing to 1.5.
Set first line indent of a paragraph to half an inch using ParagraphFormat.FirstLineIndent property.
Apply built‑in Heading1 style to the current paragraph by assigning ParagraphFormat.StyleIdentifier to StyleIdentifier.Heading1.
Apply a custom paragraph style named MyStyle by setting ParagraphFormat.StyleName property to the style name.
Use StyleIdentifier enumeration to select a locale‑independent style for a paragraph, ensuring consistent formatting.
Retrieve the number of lines in a paragraph by calling Paragraph.GetLinesCount() and store the result.
Log each paragraph’s line count to the console for debugging paragraph layout issues.
Insert a style separator run between two text runs to combine different paragraph styles within one paragraph.
Search document runs for StyleIdentifier.StyleSeparator to identify existing style separators for further processing.
Enable bi‑directional marks before saving to plain text by setting Document.AddBidiMarks property to true.
Export a document to TXT format while preserving headers and footers by enabling ExportHeadersFooters option during save.
Export a document to TXT without headers and footers by setting ExportHeadersFooters option to false.
Load a plain‑text file with DetectNumberingWithWhitespaces enabled to automatically recognize list items.
Convert detected plain‑text list numbering into Word list structures after loading the document successfully.
Navigate to a specific paragraph index using DocumentBuilder.MoveToParagraph before applying formatting changes programmatically.
Modify paragraph spacing before and after by setting ParagraphFormat.SpaceBefore and SpaceAfter properties appropriately.
Set paragraph shading background color to light gray using ParagraphFormat.Shading.BackgroundPatternColor property.
Apply right‑to‑left paragraph direction by setting ParagraphFormat.Bidi property to true for Arabic text.
Insert an empty paragraph after a bookmark by moving the builder to the bookmark and calling InsertParagraph.
Remove all paragraphs that use a specific style identifier, such as StyleIdentifier.Quote, from the document.
Replace text within a paragraph while preserving its original formatting by using Run.Replace method.
Merge consecutive paragraphs that share identical formatting into a single paragraph to simplify document structure.
Split a long paragraph into multiple shorter paragraphs at specified character positions to improve readability.
Insert a paragraph with a page break before it by setting ParagraphFormat.PageBreakBefore property to true.
Set paragraph outline level to 2 for subheadings to ensure proper inclusion in generated table of contents.
Apply a specific paragraph style to all heading paragraphs using a style selector loop across the document.
Count the number of paragraphs that contain a given keyword and output the total count result.
Add a paragraph containing a hyperlink run and assign the built‑in Hyperlink style to it.
Insert a paragraph with a field code such as DATE and format the field result using paragraph formatting.
Determine whether a paragraph resides inside a table by checking Paragraph.IsInTable property value.
Export paragraphs to plain text with line numbers prefixed by enabling line numbering option in SaveOptions.
Load a TXT file with list detection disabled and compare the resulting document's list formatting to enabled mode.
